results.rendered_html:
citrā [citr-ac]
1 N. of the fourteenth lunar mansion consisting of one star; himanirmuktayoryoge citrācaṃdramasoriva  R. 1. 46. 
2 A kind of snake.
3 Worldly illusion, unreality.
Comp.
— aṭīraḥ
1 the moon.
2 the forehead spotted with the blood of a goat offered as a victim to a deity.
— īśaḥ the moon.
— maghā the dawn.
